topics: Graph Data Structures, Low-Level Design, C++
summary: The technical round focused heavily on Graph traversal algorithms and a Low-Level Design question involving an in-memory file system. The interviewer expected highly optimized C++ code.

topics: Dynamic Programming, Probability & Math, OS Threads
summary: Round 1 was an OA with 2 coding questions (array manipulation and a hard DP stock maximization problem). Round 2 was a technical deep dive into OS Threading vs Multiprocessing, followed by Dijkstra's algorithm on a shared doc.
